description: Jesus is baptized by John the Baptist. Beginning of public ministry.
Jesus preaches in the synagogue and is rejected by his hometown people.
Jesus makes Capernaum his base for ministry in Galilee. Many healings and miracles occur here.
Jesus walks on water, calms the storm, teaches from boats. Calls disciples to be fishers of men.
Jesus meets the Samaritan woman at the well. Ministry to Samaria.
Jesus performs his first miracle, turning water into wine at a wedding.
Jesus heals a lame man at the Pool of Bethesda on the Sabbath in Jerusalem.
Jesus ministers beyond the Jewish borders to Gentile regions. Heals daughter of Canaanite woman.
